7239.title: Written In Blood
7239.description: Crime novelist Simon Toyne examines some of the darkest real-life crime stories. He investigates the similarities between the works of famous writers and the grim realities of true crime.

7240.title: Judge Judy
7240.description: A teenager is called to testify against his parents.

7241.title: Cheaters
7241.description: Ray wonders whether his girlfriend turned down his proposal because her heart lies elsewhere. Rachel finds texts from another woman on her partner's phone.

7242.title: World's Most Evil Killers
7242.description: Delving into the horrific serial killer Harold Shipman, a trusted GP who murdered at least 215 people, and was found guilty for the murder of 15.

7243.title: Judge Judy
7243.description: A man refuses to repay $4,000 to his ex-girlfriend and a short-term couple feud over rent. Then, a lease and a security deposit and a woman insists that her stepmother forgave a car loan.

7244.title: Judge Judy
7244.description: The plaintiff says her child's father took her car without permission and wrecked it. Then, a woman denies owing for a saddle she says was lost when she was thrown from a horse.

7245.title: Judge Judy
7245.description: A woman sues her grandson's father for child-care costs and a loan, but he says it was all a gift. Then, a man says he does not owe his ex for damages to her car because he was the victim of a hit-and-run accident.

7246.title: Something's Killing Me
7246.description: Several doctors and CDC authorities spend months trying to figure out what California honeymooners, a surfer in Hawaii and a toddler in Tennessee have in common.

7247.title: Operation Repo
7247.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7248.title: Operation Repo
7248.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7249.title: Judge Judy
7249.description: A dispute over professional photos of a child and drug abuse. Then, a man is accused of backing into a woman's car.

7250.title: Judge Judy
7250.description: A vicious assault with high heels at a rowdy college party leaves the plaintiff's face requiring stitches.

7251.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
7251.description: Team Salvage is tasked with repairing an underwater pipeline and rescuing a concrete houseboat from deep within the mangroves.

7252.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
7252.description: They say, `you can't teach an old dog new tricks', but nobody has said anything about being unable to teach a bounty-hunting Dog new tricks. Which is good because after an eight-season run on A&E, Duane `Dog' Chapman brings his people-tracking skills to a new network, along with wife Beth and their son, Leland. But this time the Chapmans aren't searching for fugitives on their home turf of Hawaii. Instead, they travel to a different city each week and work with the local bondsman offices and bounty hunters, using their years of experience in the business to assist the local agents. The Chapmans motivate and inspire the local bounty hunters while training them how to use high-tech tracking devices and showing them new techniques they can use in finding fugitives.

7253.title: Close Calls On Camera
7253.description: Nick Knowles examines the rescue of a young man missing overnight after being swept out to sea on his surfboard, and a local resident comes to the aid of a young woman who topples into a city centre river during a night on the town with friends.

7254.title: Operation Repo
7254.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7255.title: Operation Repo
7255.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7256.title: Haunted Case Files
7256.description: The spirit of a murderer tries to possess an investigator in an Ohio library, and a woman is terrorised by shadow-like figures in her home in Massachusetts.

7257.title: Judge Judy
7257.description: Exes fight over money, a man says his neighbours' dog attacked his two dogs and sues for vet bills, and a couple sue their daughter for rent.

7258.title: Judge Judy
7258.description: Fellow Lion's Club members accuse each other of face-punching, teeth breaking, and cursing at a wife.

7259.title: Judge Judy
7259.description: A man demands that his ex-roommate pay him back for unpaid rent. A man accuses his former tenant of owing for rent and the unpaid balance on a scooter.

7261.description: Team Salvage is tasked with repairing an underwater pipeline and rescuing a concrete houseboat from deep within the mangroves.

7262.title: Something's Killing Me
7262.description: What really happens when we die? For thousands of years, the dreams and visions of the dying have captivated cultures. But what are they - what causes them? And are they real?

7263.title: Close Calls On Camera
7263.description: Nick Knowles examines the rescue of a young man missing overnight after being swept out to sea on his surfboard, and a local resident comes to the aid of a young woman who topples into a city centre river during a night on the town with friends.

7265.title: Judge Judy
7265.description: A woman's expensive lingerie goes missing; a man beats a pit bull after it attacks him.

7266.title: Judge Judy
7266.description: A dog's owners sue the pet sitter for veterinary bills after the animal is hit by a car; a former friend sues a hair salon owner for repayment of loans.

7267.title: Haunted Case Files
7267.description: The spirit of a murderer tries to possess an investigator in an Ohio library, and a woman is terrorised by shadow-like figures in her home in Massachusetts.

7276.title: World's Most Evil Killers
7276.description: A look at the life of the notorious murderer, who broke into a home and took the lives of three family members in a senseless killing.

7277.title: Cheaters
7277.description: Tony's suspicions are aroused when wife Becky misses their first wedding anniversary. David is worried about the lack of intimacy between him and wife Kim.

7278.title: Wives With Knives
7278.description: Debra Hudson dedicates herself to helping others, then a volatile relationship causes her own addictions to resurface with a vengeance.

7279.title: Paranormal Survivor
7279.description: A man explains how his home went from strange to scary. A man explains how he became a beacon for lost spirits. A woman claims to have been violently attacked by a shadowy monster.
